scripts.build:standard: python3 scripts/build_launch_digest.py --release-notes data/release_notes_may.md --faq data/customer_faq.md --limitations data/known_limitations.md --format-guide reference/digest_format.md --audience-notes reference/audience_notes.md --output results/launch_digest.md
scripts.customer-ready: npm run build:standard && npm install ./packages/digest-theme-kit && npx digest-theme-kit --source results/launch_digest.md --output results/launch_digest.md && npm run validate
